name: Mutual NDA
description: A standard mutual non-disclosure agreement for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: A cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to specify deal-specific terms that incorporate the standard terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering subscription terms, data handling, and service commitments.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: A standard agreement for design partnership engagements, allowing vendors and customers to collaborate on product development with defined terms.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: A standard service level agreement designed to be used alongside the Cloud Service Agreement, defining uptime commitments, support response times, and remedies.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: A standard agreement for professional services engagements, covering statements of work, deliverables, and consulting terms.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A standard data processing agreement for defining how personal data is handled, ensuring compliance with data protection regulations.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard partnership agreement for formalizing technology partnerships, covering joint activities, revenue sharing, and collaboration terms.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A standard agreement for licensing software products, covering license grants, restrictions, support, and maintenance terms.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A standard short-term agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A standard HIPAA business associate agreement for defining how protected health information is handled between covered entities and business associates.

name: AI Addendum
description: A standard addendum addressing AI-specific terms for use with existing agreements, covering AI usage rights, data handling, and model training restrictions.
